code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1_opt = io.read_line()
  let line2_opt = io.read_line()
  let line1 = match line1_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match line2_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut found = -1
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if lo > hi
      done = true
    else
      let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
      let v = match nums.get(mid)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v == target
        found = mid
        done = true
      else if v < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    end
  end
  if found == -1
    print("not_found")
  else
    print("index=#{found}")
  end
end
